name: The Chaotic Phantasmal Sacred Beasts
desc:
3 Level 10 monsters that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by sending the above cards you control to the GY. You can only Special Summon "The Chaotic Phantasmal Sacred Beasts" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use. The first two times this card on the field would be destroyed by card effect each turn, it is not destroyed. Once per Chain, up to thrice per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then you can gain LP equal to half that monster's ATK.
